title: Add user icon and replace computer icon in attack path visualizer

requirements.text: Add a user icon to the attack path visualizer toolbar as a draggable element that can be placed on the canvas

quotes: In attackpath visualizer, put a user icon

acceptanceCriteria: A user icon appears in the attack path visualizer toolbar alongside existing icons
The user icon can be dragged from the toolbar and placed on the canvas
Placed user icons can be moved, resized, and deleted like other icons
The user icon is included in save/load operations and PNG export

requirements.text: Replace the current computer icon in the attack path visualizer with a single computer icon image

quotes: Change the Computer Icon into a one computer icon image

acceptanceCriteria: The computer icon in the toolbar displays as a single computer icon image
The visual representation clearly depicts one computer
Existing diagrams with computer icons continue to render correctly
The computer icon maintains consistent styling with other attack path icons

nonGoals: Changes to other attack path icons beyond user and computer
Modifications to backend diagram storage schema
Changes to authentication or user profile functionality

required: Simple user profile icon illustration in black and white, showing a person silhouette (user-icon.dim_128x128.png)
Single desktop computer icon illustration in black and white, showing one computer monitor and base unit (computer-icon.dim_128x128.png)
